record.field: <data> <!-- Step 1: remove time — now only ONE appointment_date left (date field) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date'][@widget='time']" position="replace"/> <!-- Step 2: remove healthprof from end --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="replace"/> <!-- Step 3: insert healthprof after the now-unique appointment_date (=Fecha) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date']" position="after"> <field name="healthprof" expand="1" width="300"/> </xpath> <!-- Step 4: insert time after healthprof (unique anchor, reliable) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="after"> <field name="appointment_date" string="Time" widget="time"/> </xpath> </data>
